title: V3DfgDfgToAst.cpp:48: Incorrect width in AstNode created from DfgVertex REPLICATE: 1 vs 8
body:
```
%Error: Internal Error: <snip>: ../V3DfgDfgToAst.cpp:48: Incorrect width in AstNode created from DfgVertex REPLICATE: 1 vs 8
  213 |             A: rslt = {  {4'd8{|srcA[63:56]}},
```

When I change to the following it successfully builds.
`  213 |             A: rslt = {  {8{|srcA[63:56]}},`

Perhaps not a big deal, but wanted to open if useful.

```
verilator \
   --cc \
   --top aerial_wrap \
   -sv \
   -DVERILATOR=1 \
   -DCOMMON_CELLS_ASSERTS_OFF=1 \
   --build-jobs 8 \
   --trace \
   --trace-structs \
   --trace-max-array 16 \
   -output-split 15000 \
   --threads 4 \
   --no-assert \
   -O3 \
```

`Darwin easyemachine.local 24.5.0 Darwin Kernel Version 24.5.0: Tue Apr 22 19:53:27 PDT 2025; root:xnu-11417.121.6~2/RELEASE_ARM64_T6041 arm64`

Thanks,
-e-
